name: AI stock fundamental analysis
description: Researches stock financials using Exa web search, Claude AI analyzes fundamentals including revenue, earnings, margins, and valuation metrics, then saves a structured analysis report to Google Drive. Adapted from n8n's AI crew fundamental stock analysis workflow.

source.originalName: AI crew to automate fundamental stock analysis - Q&A workflow

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for financial research

driveKey.description: Google Drive connection key for saving the analysis report

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol to analyze (e.g., AAPL, MSFT, TSLA)

companyName.description: Full company name for the stock (e.g., Apple Inc.)

driveFolderId.description: Google Drive folder ID for saving the report

steps.name: Search Exa for financial data and reports

code.source:
const topic = $.input.topic || $.input.companyName || $.input.marketFocus || "market analysis";
return { query: topic + " stock market analysis trends" };

steps.name: Search Exa for valuation and analyst ratings
Build Claude prompt for fundamental analysis
Save report to temp file for upload
